Dum Biryani

Chicken Dum Biryani.

Layered perfection.

Aromatic basmati layers.

Each grain infused with saffron, ghee, and spices.

Slow-cooked to perfection.

Sealed and cooked on dum for deep flavor infusion.

Authentic. Traditional.

Crafted with Tradition

Prepared using age-old dum techniques with premium basmati rice, marinated chicken, fried onions, and spices, sealed and slow-cooked to lock aroma.

Spice Level
Medium
Cooking Time
2 hrs
Layers
5+

Aroma Sealed

Handcrafted spices. Authentic dum.

Freshly Prepared

Cooked fresh for every order. No reheating. Dum process ensures deep flavor and moisture retention.
